description: This pipeline detects lines in an image using the ridge detector and then converts the detected lines to a binary mask. The main steps involve detecting the lines, converting to a binary mask, and outputting the result.

653a145a-533e-47e5-8549-142ea7014d9c.name: ij1-segment-ridge-detector-2d
653a145a-533e-47e5-8549-142ea7014d9c.description: A ridge detector that detects lines and outputs a binary mask where lines are detected.

5263b3cc-afc1-4ce1-8bf6-b6bba179d8eb.name: ij1-blur-gaussian2d
5263b3cc-afc1-4ce1-8bf6-b6bba179d8eb.description: Applies convolution with a Gaussian function for smoothing. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.
